Bantamweight

Bantamweight (130.0-138.0 lbs) fighter ranks

The rankings presented are computerized and provided by the FightMatrix ranking system, which utilizes a comprehensive MMA fight database to provide objective rankings. Please note, that these rankings ONLY contain fighters who have had at least one professional fight some time in the 450 days prior to the ranking date.

Issue Date: 5/10/2026 (Official Release: #1023)

Drop out symbols: * = Inactive (450d), + = Moved Divisions (Up), - = Moved Divisions (Down), % = Forced, ! = Results/Other

Ranked Fighters: 1-25    >     >>

5 thoughts on “Bantamweight”

  1. hepatoburn says:
    May 11, 2025 at 7:38 am

    I’m curious. Why did you specifically set the bantamweight limit to 138? For flyweight it’s 129.9, and for featherweight it’s 149.9. Wouldn’t it make sense for bantamweight to be 139.9?

    Reply
    1. Oleg says:
      May 18, 2025 at 8:25 am

      We try to set divisional weights to catch the slight variance in weight classes between different promotions.

      Reply
  2. Will says:
    February 20, 2025 at 2:55 pm

    I’m curious. Why did you specifically set the bantamweight limit to 138? For flyweight it’s 129.9, and for featherweight it’s 149.9. Wouldn’t it make sense for bantamweight to be 139.9?

    Reply
    1. Oleg says:
      February 20, 2025 at 8:17 pm

      We try to set weight limits to best account for variance across different leagues.

      Reply
  3. Mehdi Benzerraouia says:
    May 7, 2024 at 9:59 am

    Anas Azizoun is french and not german

    Reply
